title: Add Controller Support and Input Mode Manager

deltas.description: A new service to handle switching between `MENU`, `MAP`, `UNIT`, and `INVENTORY` input states.
Complete the `InputActions` defaults with comprehensive joypad bindings for all actions.
Update `SettingsMenu` and other core UI scenes to support controller/keyboard navigation via explicit focus links and visual states.
Enable BBCode on the Controls tab layout display (DONE).
